title: lobelia microphylla
intro: Lobelia microphylla, also known as small-leaf lobelia or dwarf lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the eastern United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia microphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. Lobelia microphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution should be exercised when consuming it due to its potential toxicity at high doses.
